caption: Two men are seated in a room in front of a television. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, and the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace. The man on the right has his hand near his mouth. Behind them, a television displays the neon text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" above a shelf of CDs. A smaller inset screen shows a silhouette of a figure in a dress standing next to a large spherical object suspended by ropes. Across the sequence, the men remain largely still with skeptical facial expressions. In the inset video, the figure reaches toward the spherical object; in the final frames, the figure appears to push or strike the sphere, causing it to move slightly. The lighting remains consistent, and the background elements do not change.
